MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling, modified, as follows:

DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE, INC.'S Motion To Seal is continued to February 20, 2018 pending the determination of the complex designation application. This case was consolidated under the lead case Lefiti v. Allied Universal 559883 per court order filed on 2/07/18 under the lead case.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.
